title: [BUG] Vulnerabilities in dependencies of exceljs package
author: nilamsavani91
body:
## 🐛 Bug Report

<!-- A clear and concise description of what the bug is. -->

Lib version: 4.2.0

## Issue
I conducted a dependency check scan on the code and it identified the NPM CLI package as one with high vulnerability due to the number of vulnerabilities it found for that package. The version of the package is vulnerable to a few things including Path Traversal, Link Following, Improper Privilege Management and Information exposure through log files. All the vulnerabilities identified are classified as medium based on the cvss score but due to multiple vulnerabilities it tagged the package as high vulnerability.

[exceljs_dependency-check_2021-03-10.zip](https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs/files/6126062/exceljs_dependency-check_2021-03-10.zip)

comments.author: nilamsavani91
comments.body: @Siemienik @alubbe @Alanscut Is this something that you guys can fix?
